name: vantage-orchestrator
description: An orchestrator skill that plans any mission into a wave-based DAG and resolves each slice through a tiered agent ladder: reuse a mission-agnostic core agent (researcher, ideation, implementation, validator, auditor, optimizer), reuse a bundled or previously-synthesized specialist, or synthesize a new agent hyper-focused on the ask and persist it for reuse. It deploys sub-agents in parallel, gates each wave through an auditor, and runs autonomously under configurable autonomy and external-authority dials, with a non-negotiable safety floor and run-budget stop conditions. Ships a commerce pack (website-build, frontend-tester) and a portable optimizer skill. Venture-agnostic: driven by a mission blueprint.
